instruction: The coffee icon has two problems: it's been tinted yellow AND the canvas is clipping it (64x64). Restore both the color and the viewBox.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64" width="64" height="64">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="64" height="64" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/coffee.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #fde047" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M18 8h1a4 4 0 0 1 0 8h-1"/><path d="M2 8h16v9a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V8z"/><line x1="6" y1="1" x2="6" y2="4"/><line x1="10" y1="1" x2="10" y2="4"/><line x1="14" y1="1" x2="14" y2="4"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/coffee.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M18 8h1a4 4 0 0 1 0 8h-1"/><path d="M2 8h16v9a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H6a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V8z"/><line x1="6" y1="1" x2="6" y2="4"/><line x1="10" y1="1" x2="10" y2="4"/><line x1="14" y1="1" x2="14" y2="4"/></g>
</svg>
